column2: # Reusable plotter: clean axes, per‑panel regression eq + R², and CSV export of the exact plotting table
lim_hi <- quantile(c(d$pm_epa, d$pm_cinc), probs = q, na.rm = TRUE)
slope = if (n() > 2) coef(lm(pm_cinc ~ pm_epa))[2] else NA_real_,
intercept = if (n() > 2) coef(lm(pm_cinc ~ pm_epa))[1] else NA_real_,
r2 = if (n() > 2) summary(lm(pm_cinc ~ pm_epa))$r.squared else NA_real_,
coord_equal(xlim = lims, ylim = lims, expand = FALSE) +
geom_text(data = site_stats, aes(x = x_lab, y = y_lab, label = eq_label),
ggplot2::ggsave(paste0("figs/", file_stub, ".png"), p, width = 13, height = 10, dpi = 320)
